3022370.name: Turbo Bullets
3022370.description:
Get ready for a wild ride in this exciting battle car racing simulator inspired by Death Race movie. Ram, shoot, flip your opponents over, wreck them before the race ends, or get first to the finish line. You sit inside a 4 ton charriot of death, so jokes aside - go and unleash hell.

< GAMEPLAY: WIN, EARN, UPGRADE, FACE ENEMIES. REPEAT >

Race around dangerous circuits and shoot your opponents to death or get first to the finish line in this dynamic tactical combat racer inspired by Death Rally, Borderlands and Mario Kart. Win races to earn glorious prizes, spend your money to buy faster cars, deadlier weapons and upgraded equipment.

Visit dystopian wastelands, freezing glaciers, hot sands of the Sahara and picturesque islands. Use weapons you bought before the race or collect them and avoid deadly traps. Send your opponents to the junkyard using the right moment to attack.

Lay mines, drop bombs, shoot mortars, cannon and rockets. Wield a variety of crazy weapons, such as the scrap thrower to push your opponents off the cliffs, or show them who is boss and shoot their as* off...

< HIGH-PACED, ADRENALINE FUELED COMBAT RACER >

A really juicy combat model, fast action, interesting gameplay mechanics and a tons of available weapons blend together into one satisfying experience.

Reflexes, nerves of steel and the ability to think tactically is the core of Turbo Bullets gameplay - a game, that takes it's inspiration from movie "Death Race" with Jason Statham. 

< CHOSE YOUR STRATEGY TO WIN >

Go loud and ram your way to the finish line, or  skillfully use shortcuts and perform spectacular jumps to gain valuable seconds. Push your foes into exploding barrels, or unleash deadly fire from a sentry towers on them, make use of scrap thrower to push your opponents off the cliffs -the path to victory depends solely on you.

< PROVEN GAMEPLAY LOOP >

We like proven gameplay mechanics, so we derived many of them from the classics you already love. Collect funds to buy faster and more powerfull cars, spend the money earned to create your own best equipment combinations.

< "LETHAL TOURNAMENT" >

Taking place in the shadow of shady dealings, illegal races without rules. Arm yourself and race to the finish line, or finish off all your opponents! In this race, everyone and everything wants to kill you! Armed police will also want to get you - you are operating under cover, so they do not know that you are on their side. Avoid traps and deadly turrets to  win races and duels, climb your career to buy faster and more powerful cars. Tune your ride and acquire modern weapons and use them to scrap your opponents! Watch out for the ubiquitous turrets and traps, or use the map elements to gain advantage! In these crazy races, tactics and planning play a key role!

<<< DONT WAIT ANYMORE - ADD TO WISHLIST NOW!!! ( and follow ) >>>

< WEAPONS >

Machine Gun

A best friend, you can always rely on. Use it to turn your opponents into Swiss cheese and send them straight to the scrapyard

Homing missle Launcher

Use the limited ammunition of this powerful weapon to tear your opponents to shreds. Wait for the right moment and unleash destruction

Mortar Launcher

This ancient but deadly weapon deals massive area damage. An accurate hit with a mortar burst will turn even the toughest opponent into a burning pile.

Anti Tank Cannon

The name says it all! This big boy makes the earth trumble. Try to collect ammo for A.T.C. but once you make it, your opponents will beg you for mercy

Bomb

Spawn a bomb directly behind your vehicle and watch in the rearview camera as this powerful weapon sweeps your opponents off the track like a giant bowling ball

Landmine

Use this limited weapon to destroy your opponents with precision. A properly placed mine can turn itself into an invisible weapon and send the enemy to the scrapheap of history

( even more weaponry to come )

STORY

"They" call you when there is need for the best driver for a fishy job.

One day, you get caught in a police ambush. You receive an offer you cannot refuse - the prosecutor will withdraw the charges if you become a police plug.

You take part in set of dangerous races known as "Lethal Tournament" to infiltrate a criminal group and find out who is responsible for organizing this dangerous event.

EARLY ACCESS

Coming Early Access version is going to feature:

* 5 diverse maps - races take place around the world. Rush through wasteland deserts, freezing glaciers, toxic countryside, city construction sites and breathtaking islands.

* Tournament mode

* Arena Mode

* Single player - single race game mode

* Local multiplayer splitscreen - up to 4 players having fun simultaneosly in PvP / PvPvE matches!

英语*, 波兰语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
